name: Agent Architecture
description: Refactor all LLM interactions into agents (LLMs using tools in a loop). Three agents: Extraction, Strategist, Assistant. Powered by aisdk for provider-agnostic interaction. Generic ingest dispatcher replaces per-table write functions.

userStories.title: Ingest dispatcher: create operation with column whitelisting
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a generic create operation that inserts into any whitelisted table with column validation, session_id auto-injection, and INSERT OR IGNORE semantics returning id + created boolean.
acceptanceCriteria: dispatcher::create() inserts into all 10 writable tables with correct column whitelisting
dispatcher::create() rejects unknown columns and unknown tables with descriptive errors
dispatcher::create() returns {id, created: true} for new rows, {id, created: false} for duplicates
dispatcher::create() auto-injects session_id — caller never provides it
dispatcher::create() validates value constraints (enums, ranges) before SQL execution
cargo build --bin rt succeeds
cargo test --bin rt passes
cargo clippy --bin rt passes
userStories.notes: Foundation for all agents. Column whitelist defined as static data. 10 writable tables: hosts, ports, credentials, access_levels, flags, notes, web_paths, vulns, hypotheses, evidence. Protected tables (sessions, command_history, chat_messages) rejected.

userStories.title: Ingest dispatcher: ip-to-host_id resolution on create
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the create operation to resolve ip to host_id for ports, web_paths, and vulns tables, auto-creating the host record if it doesn't exist.
acceptanceCriteria: dispatcher::create() resolves ip to host_id for ports, web_paths, vulns
Host auto-created when ip not yet in hosts table
Existing host reused when ip already exists
evidence.hypothesis_id foreign key validated (must belong to current session)
cargo build --bin rt succeeds
cargo test --bin rt passes
cargo clippy --bin rt passes
userStories.notes: LLM sends ip in data, Rust pops it and resolves to host_id before INSERT.

userStories.title: Ingest dispatcher: query operation with filtering
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a generic query operation that returns all columns as JSON for any whitelisted table, supporting key-value filters with AND semantics and virtual ip filter for joined tables.
acceptanceCriteria: dispatcher::query() returns all columns (including id, timestamps) as JSON for any whitelisted table
dispatcher::query() supports key-value filter with AND semantics
dispatcher::query() resolves virtual ip filter for ports/web_paths/vulns via JOIN through hosts
Filter keys validated against column whitelist + id
cargo build --bin rt succeeds
cargo test --bin rt passes
cargo clippy --bin rt passes

userStories.title: Ingest dispatcher: update operation
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a generic update operation that modifies only writable columns for an existing record by id, with value constraint validation.
acceptanceCriteria: dispatcher::update() modifies only writable columns, requires id
dispatcher::update() returns error for unknown columns
dispatcher::update() validates value constraints (enums, ranges)
cargo build --bin rt succeeds
cargo test --bin rt passes
cargo clippy --bin rt passes

userStories.title: Schema as_json with value constraints and protected table exclusion
userStories.description: As a developer, I need as_json() to exclude protected tables and include value constraints so the LLM sees a complete, accurate schema.
acceptanceCriteria: as_json() output excludes sessions, command_history, chat_messages tables
as_json() output includes value constraints for enum columns (hosts.status, hypotheses.status/priority, evidence.severity, vulns.severity, ports.protocol, web_paths.scheme)
as_json() output includes range constraints (ports.port 1-65535, web_paths.port 1-65535, web_paths.status_code 100-599, hypotheses.confidence 0.0-1.0)
cargo build --bin rt succeeds
cargo test --bin rt passes
cargo clippy --bin rt passes

userStories.title: Agent struct with run() and stream() methods + ToolContext
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the Agent struct with run() (completion) and stream() (token streaming) methods, ToolContext with Arc<Mutex<Connection>>, and tool constructor functions that produce valid aisdk Tool instances.
acceptanceCriteria: Agent struct exists with run() and stream() methods sharing a build_request() builder
ToolContext with Arc<Mutex<Connection>>, session_id, cwd works correctly across tool closures
make_query_tool, make_create_tool, make_update_tool produce valid aisdk Tool instances
Tool input schemas derived via schemars on Deserialize+JsonSchema input structs
aisdk added to Cargo.toml with anthropic and openaichatcompletions features
cargo build --bin rt succeeds
cargo test --bin rt passes
cargo clippy --bin rt passes
userStories.notes: Tools constructed as closures capturing Arc<ToolContext>. Not using #[tool] macro since closures need DB access. run() calls generate_text(), stream() calls stream_text().

userStories.title: Anthropic provider configuration from config
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the Anthropic provider constructed from config.general.llm_provider and config.general.llm_model, with a new llm_provider config field.
acceptanceCriteria: New config.general.llm_provider field (default 'anthropic')
Anthropic provider constructed via aisdk DynamicModel builder from config values
Provider reads ANTHROPIC_API_KEY from env
cargo build --bin rt succeeds
cargo test --bin rt passes

userStories.title: Extraction Agent definition with system prompt and tools
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the Extraction Agent defined with query/create/update tools, a system prompt including DB schema and extraction instructions, JSON-structured input, and max 5 rounds.
acceptanceCriteria: Extraction Agent registers only query_table, create_record, update_record tools
System prompt includes DB schema from as_json(), extraction-specific instructions, and budget awareness
Input is JSON-structured: {task:extract, command:..., tool:..., output:...}
Max 5 rounds enforced via stop_when hook
Tool errors returned to LLM as error strings for self-correction
Empty/no-output commands skip extraction (no LLM call)
cargo build --bin rt succeeds
cargo test --bin rt passes
userStories.notes: Agent tests use mock LanguageModel with canned tool calls + in-memory SQLite.

userStories.title: Wire Extraction Agent into rt proxy
userStories.description: As a pentester, I want command outputs automatically extracted into structured KB data when I run commands through rt proxy.
acceptanceCriteria: rt proxy triggers Extraction Agent via spawn mechanism replacing old extraction.rs path
Extraction Agent creates correct KB records from nmap output (hosts + ports)
Extraction Agent queries existing data before creating to avoid duplicates
Extraction skipped for empty/no-output commands
cargo build --bin rt succeeds
cargo test --bin rt passes
userStories.notes: spawn.rs -> rt pipeline extract triggers Extraction Agent instead of old extract_sync function.

userStories.title: suggest and respond tool constructors
userStories.description: As a developer, I need suggest and respond tools that produce user-visible output without modifying DB state.
acceptanceCriteria: make_suggest_tool produces valid aisdk Tool with text and priority parameters
make_respond_tool produces valid aisdk Tool with text parameter
suggest tool returns success with the suggestion text for caller to display
respond tool returns success with the response text for caller to display
cargo build --bin rt succeeds
cargo test --bin rt passes
userStories.notes: Output tools — they don't modify DB state. With run(), results collected via step inspection. With stream(), respond text streams token by token.

userStories.title: Assistant Agent: rt ask with streaming
userStories.description: As a pentester, I want to run rt ask and get a streamed answer with markdown-to-ANSI rendering based on my KB data.
acceptanceCriteria: rt ask 'question' streams response tokens to terminal via agent.stream()
respond tool output rendered with markdown-to-ANSI (code blocks, bold, lists)
suggest tool output displayed with priority indicator
Assistant Agent has all 6 tools registered
Max 20 rounds enforced
Chat history saved for rt ask
System prompt includes DB schema, session context, encourages concise answers
cargo build --bin rt succeeds
cargo test --bin rt passes

userStories.title: Assistant Agent: rt query (one-shot, no history)
userStories.description: As a pentester, I want to run rt query for a one-shot answer without chat history so I can script queries.
acceptanceCriteria: rt query 'question' runs to completion via agent.run(), no chat history saved
Same tools and system prompt as rt ask
Switching provider in config works without code changes
cargo build --bin rt succeeds
cargo test --bin rt passes

userStories.title: run_command tool with output sanitization
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the run_command tool that executes shell commands with ANSI stripping, progress bar removal, newline collapsing, output chunking, and command_history logging.
acceptanceCriteria: make_run_command_tool executes sh -c in workspace cwd
Captures stdout + stderr
Strips ANSI escape sequences from output
Removes progress bars and excessive whitespace
Chunks output exceeding 12000 chars into manageable pieces
Logs command to command_history table with exit code and duration
Returns sanitized output + exit code to LLM
Timeout at 300 seconds
Only registered by Assistant Agent
cargo build --bin rt succeeds
cargo test --bin rt passes

userStories.title: Strategist Agent: post-command hints in rt proxy
userStories.description: As a pentester, I want to see a brief suggestion after a command produces interesting results, displayed inline below the command output.
acceptanceCriteria: Strategist Agent has tools: query_table, create_record, update_record, suggest
Post-command hint fires after extraction creates new records
Hint input is JSON: {task:advise, trigger:new_records, new_records:[...]}
Hint displayed inline below command output in rt proxy
No hint displayed if strategist returns no suggest calls
Max 5 rounds enforced
Two LLM calls per interesting command (extraction + strategist), zero for boring commands
cargo build --bin rt succeeds
cargo test --bin rt passes

userStories.title: Strategist Agent: rt advise for full analysis
userStories.description: As a pentester, I want to run rt advise and get a full strategic analysis with L0-L4 reasoning, hypothesis ranking, and attack path suggestions.
acceptanceCriteria: rt advise 'question' runs full strategic analysis
Advise input is JSON: {task:advise, trigger:user_request, question:...}
Strategist can create/update hypotheses via tools
System prompt includes L0-L4 methodology, BISCL, hypothesis management instructions
cargo build --bin rt succeeds
cargo test --bin rt passes

userStories.title: Skills integration: tools field in skill.toml
userStories.description: As a pentester, I want skills to restrict which tools an agent uses so that phase-specific behavior is enforced.
acceptanceCriteria: skill.toml accepts optional tools array field
Missing tools field means all agent tools available (backwards compatible)
Effective tool set = intersection of agent tools and skill-declared tools
Skill loader parses and exposes tools list
Agent construction applies intersection before registering tools with aisdk
Existing skills updated with tools field
rt skill test validates tools field values against known tool names
cargo build --bin rt succeeds
cargo test --bin rt passes

userStories.title: Cleanup: delete old code paths and TUI
userStories.description: As a developer, I need all replaced code paths removed to keep the codebase clean.
acceptanceCriteria: All add_* functions removed from kb.rs
apply_extraction and call_llm removed from extraction.rs
Old call_api, tool_definitions, execute_tool removed from ask.rs
KnowledgeBase trait has only read methods
Hypotheses trait has only read methods
tui/ module deleted
agent/llm/anthropic_api.rs deleted if still exists
blocking reqwest feature removed if unused
All tests pass
cargo build clean with no dead code warnings from deleted paths
cargo clippy passes
